他，是游历山河也喜爱探案的无名书生李墨之。
“他”，自称是天下闻名的神捕门金牌捕头洛阳。
她，是武艺了得、精通医理的金牌捕头小跟班秦霜儿。
人死如灯灭，你见过分了尸的人头还会动吗？
三人恰巧因林宅大院会动的尸体这一起匪夷所思的诡案相识，随后结伴而行。可这只是李墨之认为的巧合而已……
地上爬行的血色人蛹，酒楼中离奇消失的富家公子……
在一起起诡案探秘中，李墨之的身世谜团渐渐浮出水面。而这背后更是一起尘封多年的秘案……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/524fdde8889ad938e02754bdfffda899","author":"江湖孤影一点灯","author_id":"","book_id":"7475194990860176409","book_name":"大梁诡事录","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7475195901632315929","read_count":"412","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"260002"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"102","tags":"悬疑灵异,悬疑,推理,破案","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/57a5466fde47dc52431e82515172932c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779454572&x-signature=BhUys1hzluRX8nP9nhaf3%2BHtlJ4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2509554264061307","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"84"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232056124BC2C5C472071319BF30"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读25小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":68748,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":91076,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":454},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1757595141,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7575859582280352574","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者写的很好，这是我这几个月来看到的最好的一本古代推理小说情节和细节把控都不错，还有人物我也非常喜欢 男女主没有想到是这么一层关系 但是也很有意思 这里我还有个小脑洞，就是双儿 我感觉和男主其实更合适，他俩的性格有反差，也能互补，而且好像没有那么大的距离感 当然，这只是我的想法
